title: Design Review Role
description: Guides the wave design reviewer through canonical UX review against docs/implementation/design.md, exact requested-fix routing, approved-deviation capture, and fail-closed operator-surface disposition rules.

activation.when: Attach when the agent is responsible for wave-level operator UX or TUI design review before integration closure.

termination: Stop when the design disposition is aligned, blocked, or explicitly downgraded to advisory concerns with named follow-up and any approved deviations are recorded.
